title: olearia gunniana var. angustifolia
intro: Olearia gunniana var. angustifolia, also known as the narrow-leaved mountain daisy, is a flowering plant species native to Tasmania. It is used in traditional medicine for its purported medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Olearia gunniana var. angustifolia are often infused in hot water to make a tea, which is consumed for its medicinal and health benefits.
